mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attachment (id, node_id, filename, ext, mime, size, rel_path, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{nodeId}, #{filename}, #{ext}, #{mime}, #{size}, #{relPath}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM attachment WHERE node_id = #{nodeId} ORDER BY created_at
SELECT * FROM attachment WHERE node_id IN #{i}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM attachment WHERE node_id IN #{i}
